---
title: "Common Problems"
---

**Issues covered here:**

- `uv` fails to install or is not recognised after install
- "Access denied" errors when installing software or running code
- Positron needs updating but auto-update fails

---

## UV Installation Problem

### Symptom

Running `pip install uv` fails, or `uv --version` returns `command not found` / `not recognised` after install.

### Causes and fixes

**`pip` not found or points to the wrong Python:**

```powershell
# Check which pip you have
pip --version

# If missing, try with the explicit Python launcher
python -m pip install uv
# or
py -m pip install uv
```

**`uv` installed but not on PATH:**

After install, Python scripts are placed in a folder that may not be on your system PATH (e.g. `%APPDATA%\Python\Python313\Scripts`).

1. Search Windows for **"Edit the system environment variables"**
2. Under **User variables**, select `Path` → **Edit**
3. Add the Scripts folder shown in the `pip install uv` output
4. Restart Command Prompt / PowerShell and retry `uv --version`

**On WB laptops — pip blocked by policy:**

Contact [ITHelp@worldbankgroup.org](mailto:ITHelp@worldbankgroup.org) and request permission to run `pip install` or ask for `uv` to be added to the Software Center.

::: callout-tip
If `pip install uv` succeeds but the command still isn't found after restarting, check the install output for the Scripts path and add it to PATH as described above.
:::

---

## Access Denied

### Symptom

An installer or command fails with `Access is denied`, `Permission denied`, or `Error 5`.

### Causes and fixes

**Installing software that requires admin rights:**

Most software at the WB must be installed through the **Software Center** rather than by running an installer directly. If something is missing from the Software Center:

- Submit a [Software Installation Request](https://worldbankgroup.service-now.com/wbg/en/software-installation-request?id=wbg_sc_catalog&sys_id=bd1e71b86f16d340db112d232e3ee4b7&table=sc_cat_item&searchTerm=Software%20installation)
- Or contact [ITHelp@worldbankgroup.org](mailto:ITHelp@worldbankgroup.org) / visit a [Walk-in centre](https://worldbankgroup.sharepoint.com/sites/itsupport/SitePages/PublishingPages/Walk-in-Centers-in-Washington-DC--05042021-1608401_new.aspx)

**Stata MCP running `.do` files from a OneDrive folder:**

OneDrive folders at the WB include a space in the path (`OneDrive - WBG`), which the Stata MCP extension cannot handle.

**Workaround:** move your project to a local folder with no spaces in the path, e.g.:

```
C:\Users\wb123456\code\my-project\
```

This issue is tracked on [GitHub](https://github.com/hanlulong/stata-mcp/issues/52) and will be resolved in a future extension update.

**Writing to a restricted folder:**

If you see access denied when saving files, avoid `C:\Program Files\` and use your home directory (`C:\Users\wbXXXXXXX\`) or a project folder instead.

---

## Positron Update

### Symptom

Positron shows a notification that an update is available but the update fails, or you are on an outdated version and extensions behave unexpectedly.

### Recommended approach on WB laptops

The version in the **Software Center** is the recommended baseline. Reinstall from there to get the latest stable build:

1. Open **Software Center**
2. Find **Positron** and click **Install** (or **Reinstall**)
3. This version supports **auto-updating** — after the initial install, Positron will update itself

::: callout-note
If you installed Positron manually (outside of the Software Center), the auto-update mechanism may not work correctly. Reinstall from the Software Center to restore it.
:::

### On private laptops

Download the latest installer from <https://positron.posit.co/download.html> and run it. The user-level installer does not require admin rights.

### After any update

Reload the window or restart Positron, then verify your extensions are still active (`Ctrl+Shift+X`). Occasionally an update resets extension states.
